folder_role: Test fixtures for advisor scorer including intent prompt corpora for routing accuracy tests and skill embedding seeding utilities for lane weight sweep experiments.

public_entrypoints.name: HarderIntentEntry
public_entrypoints.purpose: Interface for harder intent prompt entries with lexical mis-route categorization

public_entrypoints.name: HARDER_INTENT_PROMPT_CORPUS
public_entrypoints.purpose: Readonly array of harder intent prompts designed to test lexical mis-routing edge cases

public_entrypoints.name: IntentPromptCategory
public_entrypoints.purpose: Union type for intent prompt categories: today-correct or intent-described

public_entrypoints.name: INTENT_PROMPT_CORPUS
public_entrypoints.purpose: Readonly array of intent prompts with expected skill routing and category classification

public_entrypoints.name: SeededSkill
public_entrypoints.purpose: Interface for skill metadata used in embedding seeding operations

public_entrypoints.name: SeedResult
public_entrypoints.purpose: Interface for seeding operation results including vectors, cache stats, and skip status

public_entrypoints.name: seedSkillEmbeddings
public_entrypoints.purpose: Async function that seeds skill description embeddings with caching and environment skip support

external_imports.used_for: SHA256 hash generation for cache key computation in seed-skill-embeddings.ts
File system operations for cache manifest read/write in seed-skill-embeddings.ts
Path manipulation for cache directory resolution in seed-skill-embeddings.ts
Module URL resolution for cache directory path in seed-skill-embeddings.ts
Embedding provider creation for skill and prompt vector generation in seed-skill-embeddings.ts

integration_notes: This folder provides test fixtures for the advisor scorer system. The intent prompt corpora (INTENT_PROMPT_CORPUS and HARDER_INTENT_PROMPT_CORPUS) contain curated test prompts with expected skill routing results, used to measure scorer accuracy across different lane weight configurations. The seed-skill-embeddings module provides a caching embedding seeder that generates and caches skill description vectors for lane weight sweep experiments, with environment-aware skip logic for when embedding providers are unavailable. These fixtures are consumed by the lane-weight-sweep test harness to generate sweep reports comparing different weight vector configurations.
key_invariants: INTENT_PROMPT_CORPUS categories are today-correct or intent-described
seedSkillEmbeddings returns skipped: true when embedding provider is unavailable
seedSkillEmbeddings cache entries are keyed by sha256(description).slice(0, 16) + ':' + providerModelId
seedSkillEmbeddings treats provider creation or embedding failures as environment skips, not errors
intent prompt corpora include expectedSkill field for routing accuracy validation
harder intent prompts include reason field documenting lexical mis-route hypotheses
